docs:
# Glow Card
A border glow that tracks the mouse for connected grids and panels.
## Import
```tsx
import { GlowCard } from "@/components/ui/glow-card";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<GlowCard glowColor="#a855f7" size={undefined} duration={undefined} colorFrom={undefined} colorTo={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **glowColor** (string) — default: `"#a855f7"`: Glow color
- **size** (number): Beam size
- **duration** (number): Duration
- **colorFrom** (string): From
- **colorTo** (string): To
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx --yes github:Rydaguy101/aurora-ui add glow-card
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/glow-card
```
